title: PWIC: Loot
description: This mod contains a block which can be used as a loot block in battle royale
body:
This mod contains a block that can be used as a loot block in the royal battle.

See config for configuration.

## How to generate items:

1. Open block
2. Write the number of slots you want to generate.
3. Press Create button

### # Info
Items always spawn in random slots.

If a block is completely emptied, it will disappear.

Block is located in Functional Blocks.
